query:
insert into accounts (id, user_id, created_at, external_id, name)
                values (
                    coalesce(
                        (select id from accounts where user_id = $1 and external_id = $2),
                        $3
                    ),
                    $1, $4, $2, $5
                )
                on conflict (id) do update set
                    external_id = excluded.external_id,
                    name = excluded.name
